reason: The provided outline is sound, but the code has deviated from it. We will map the failure to specific sections and provide concrete fix instructions.

section_feedback.Section 1 - Constants and Imports: Remove the import statement for pygame as it's not required for a text-based chess simulator.
section_feedback.Section 2 - Chess Piece Classes: Implement movement and attack logic for each piece class. This will enable AI players to execute different strategies.
section_feedback.Section 3 - Chess Board and Move Notatio: Develop a command-line display for the chess board using ASCII characters. Implement logic for generating and displaying moves in standard chess notation.
section_feedback.Section 4 - AI Players and Game Logic: Create AI players capable of executing different strategies by implementing movement and attack logic for each piece class.
section_feedback.Section 5 - Main Entry Point: Add functionality to save game results with numbered moves to a text file. This will meet the requirement of saving results to a file as numbered moves in chess notation.
